title: Spicy Fluffy Tofu Stir-fry
description: A spicy and fluffy tofu dish with a vinaigrette dressing for a crowd-pleasing Filipino snack that is both comforting and refreshing.
instructions: Blanch tofu in boiling salted water for about 5 minutes. Drain and let cool slightly.
Press the cooled tofu with paper towels to remove excess moisture.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, minced garlic, black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Stir until well combined.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add drained tofu slices and pour vinaigrette mixture over them. Toss gently to coat evenly.
Cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crispy on the outside, while ensuring it remains tender inside.
Garnish with chopped cilantro just before serving. Serve hot with a squeeze of lime juice.
